title: cs188 Plays: "Escape from HoH SiS" (fan game)
description:
"Escape from HoH SiS" is a side-scrolling bullet hell game created by fan orangeTadpole.  The objective is to rescue loyal JOJites from the evil HoH SiS corporation.  Or something... how the hell should I know?  (FYI, this video was cropped from a 6-hour Christmas Eve livestream.)

A *complete* playthrough by the creator can be found here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLO1q55T03Sp_7AFHcvQUqRGMmEiIBCV3n
